name: Guided Discovery
tagline: Read the concept, then test it hands-on before practising.

generation_guidance.tone: clear and teacherly — build understanding before interaction
avoid: overwhelming the interactive with too much context

best_for: concepts that need context before interaction makes sense
lessons where learners benefit from explanation then verification
STEM and life-science topics with quantitative relationships
not_ideal_for: topics best learned through pure exploration without guidance
highly visual subjects where the figure should lead entirely
